untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (AEDT - Ascending-Ending Diagonal Triangle) which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Volume confirmation logic varies by market condition but exact breakout volume thresholds (30-day average reference) and market regime-dependent performance metrics are not fully specified in source text. Pattern detection requires shape/structural analysis beyond price/volume/momentum indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using rising volume trend (volume > sma_20) as entry signal and price mean reversion (close < sma_20) as exit for long positions. However, the core pattern identification and regime-dependent performance characteristics (-18% bull/-23% bear) cannot be reliably encoded without pattern recognition capability. Source text is incomplete ('outperfo' cuts off mid-word). Recommend manual implementation of AEDT pattern detection with volume regime confirmation.
